project_description: Building a cutting-edge macOS system intelligence — evolving X-MaC from a cleaner/optimizer into a full macOS Digital Twin with 630+ technical operations across hardware modeling, software genome, filesystem intelligence, process intelligence, unified memory, energy/battery, application intelligence, and AI reasoning.

maos.description: Mac AI OS context engine — use for context retrieval, memory search, workspace summaries, task management, and action execution

git_safety.note: Push URL is disabled to prevent accidental pushes to main. All work happens on feature branches.
